faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.whenLaunchAnswer: Tracebud is in active pilot testing. We're enrolling select partners now. Join the waitlist to be notified when we go live.
faq.whoCommoditiesAnswer: Coffee, cocoa, palm oil, rubber, soy, cattle, and wood are the primary EUDR commodities. We'll expand based on demand.
faq.howCostAnswer: Pricing is transparent and scales with your operation size. Free trial available. Details shared during onboarding.
faq.howLongAnswer: Most cooperatives are mapped and operational within 48 hours of signing up. Offline-first design means zero downtime.
faq.supportAnswer: 24/7 email support, plus priority phone support for pilot partners. Direct access to our compliance team.
